Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Hayashima_Town here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Hayashima_Town for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:早島町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:早島町の建築物|version=92434973}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:早島町の建築物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tsurusaki Shrine]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Okayama Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Hayashima, Okayama]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25441284107|time triggered pipeline]]
